== Notes for [[Item:Q83386|Q83386]] ==

Source: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Walid_ibn_Utba
--------------------
Muawiyah was one of the members of the hunting party of his maternal uncle Walid bin Utbah that pursued Muhammad during the hijra (migration), when Muhammad and Abu Bakr were hiding in Ghar al-Thawr (Cave of the Bull)

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
671E314219E801EFBC189822EF79916CDC46
geni:6000000011667059305

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
